name: Scallop Salad (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 1 dash mayonnaise or omit, as desired
12 ounces sea scallops, deveined and sliced in half horizontally
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the radicchio by cutting it into chiffonade.
2. Mix the vinaigrette with a touch of mayonnaise or omit, as desired.
3. Finely chop the minced chives.
4. Just before serving, place scallops in a wide skillet. Cover with water and bring to a simmer. Simmer for one minute. Turn off heat and pat dry.
5. Mix warm scallops and radicchio together and arrange on dinner plates. Drizzle dressing over top and garnish with chives.
Yield: 2 servings
